title: Ramakrishna Mission Beach
tagline: Ramakrishna Mission Beach — beach town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Ramakrishna Beach also known as R K Beach is situated on the east coast of Bay of Bengal in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.
overview.description: Ramakrishna Beach also known as R K Beach is situated on the east coast of Bay of Bengal in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. It is located near Dolphin's Nose. RK Beach gets its name from the Ramakrishna Mission ashram situated near the beach.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kali Temple, Visakhapatnam
topPlaces.description: The Sri Kalimatha temple of Visakhapatnam is dedicated to the Goddess Kali. The temple is located near RK Beach, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Pandurangapuram, Visakhapatnam
topPlaces.description: Pandurangapuram is a neighborhood situated on the coastal part of Visakhapatnam City, India. The area, which falls under the local administrative limits of Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation, is about 4 km from the Dwaraka Nagar which is city centre.

topPlaces.name: Nowroji Road
topPlaces.description: Nowroji Road is an important road located in the Indian city of Visakhapatnam. This road links Beach Road to Waltair Main Road.

topPlaces.name: Daspalla Hills
topPlaces.description: Daspalla Hills is an important neighborhood situated on the coastal part of Visakhapatnam City, India. The area, which falls under the local administrative limits of Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation, is about 3 km from the Dwaraka Nagar which is city centre.

topPlaces.name: Children's Arena
topPlaces.description: The Children's Arena is a children's world in Visakhapatnam, India and the only one of its type in Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Siripuram which is also known as the "heart of the city" It has a seating capacity of 1000 (600-Multipurpose Theatre + 400-Auditorium).

topPlaces.name: Siripuram, Visakhapatnam
topPlaces.description: Siripuram is an urban commercial center in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. Visakhapatnam Metropolitan Region Development Authority administrative office is located here.

topPlaces.name: Rajiv Smruthi Bhavan
topPlaces.description: Rajiv Smruthi Bhavan is a memorial and cultural center at Beach road, Pandurangapuram, Visakhapatnam. It was established in the year 2008 by the then Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh Y. S. Rajasekhara Reddy.

topPlaces.name: AU Convention Center
topPlaces.description: AU Convention Center is a convention at Beach road, Pandurangapuram, Visakhapatnam it was inaugurated in the year of 2017 by Vice-President of India Venkaiah Naidu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramakrishna Mission Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramakrishna Mission Beach is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramakrishna Mission Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramakrishna Mission Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramakrishna Mission Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramakrishna Mission Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Ramakrishna Mission Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramakrishna Mission Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kali Temple, Visakhapatnam, Pandurangapuram, Visakhapatnam, Nowroji Road, Daspalla Hills, Children's Arena.
